title: Missing security response headers
description: Check for X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, X-Frame-Options: DENY, Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin on all responses. Add as axum middleware layer if missing.
close_reason: Not vulnerable: server.rs has global security_headers middleware setting X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, X-Frame-Options: DENY, Referrer-Policy: same-origin, and CSP on all responses.
